welcome.title: Welcome to BadlandsMD
welcome.subtitle: Crossplay | 3x Harvest | 5x Tame | Fast Breed | 150 Wild

faq.question: How do I get help?
faq.answer: Ask in Global Chat or contact an Admin.

faq.question: Is PvP enabled?
faq.answer: Yes. Play fair and respect other players.

faq.question: Are there custom creatures?
faq.answer: Yes. Dragon's Kingdom, Desolatitan, Meraxes and other creatures are installed.
